raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a formal complaint against Citi for its repeated failure to resolve a legitimate credit card dispute and for a clear violation of the Credit CARD Act of 2009. The transaction in question is a charge of {$11000.00} from XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX. 

Core Violation : Citi authorized a five-figure transaction that significantly exceeded my established credit limit without my consent. I have not opted into over-limit coverage. Under federal law ( Credit CARD Act of 2009 ), Citi was required to decline this transaction. My reliance on Citis own credit limit protocols to decline unauthorized over-limit charges led me to believe the transaction would not process, prompting me to use a separate financial institution to successfully purchase valid tickets for the same event. 

History of Communication & Non-Responsiveness : I have attempted to resolve this through Citi 's internal channels multiple times, providing exhaustive documentation with each contact. Citi has consistently failed to review the evidence and has recently ceased all communication. 

XX/XX/XXXX : I submitted all requested documentation and evidence of the processing error to Citi. 

XX/XX/XXXX : Citi issued a duplicate automated request for the exact information already provided. 

XX/XX/XXXX : I sent a comprehensive " Final Notice '' email to the Dispute Department. In this email, I again provided the alternative bank statement ( {$6700.00} ), explained the price difference ( different tickets purchased due to Citi 's error ), and explicitly offered to surrender all claims to the digital tickets associated with the Citi charge. 

XX/XX/XXXX ( Approx. ) : After nearly three weeks of silence, I sent a follow-up email expressing my outrage at their lack of response and reiterating my intent to involve the CFPB. 

Current Status : As of XX/XX/XXXX, I have received no confirmation of receipt or any human response to my XX/XX/XXXX or XXXX communications. Citi continues to hold me liable for an {$11000.00} charge resulting from their own regulatory failure, despite my repeated offers to transfer the digital assets ( tickets ) back to them. 

Desired Resolution : I am requesting that the CFPB compel Citi to : Permanently credit my account for the unauthorized {$11000.00} charge. 

Provide immediate instructions on how to transfer the original digital tickets back to the bank/merchant, as I have no intention of using them. 

Cease all automated, redundant requests for information that has been in their possession for over 50 days. 

Sincerely, XXXX XXXX
